For You, Ruchiii 💖
A little something made with all the love
Happy Birthday to my forever person 💖🎂✨

Through every up and down, you've been my constant, my safe place, and my biggest comfort 🫶🥹 You've seen me at my best and my worst, and still chose to stand by me — that's something I'll always hold close to my heart 💕 Life honestly feels so much brighter, softer, and more meaningful with you in it 🌸 From all the laughter we've shared to the little moments that mean everything, every memory with you is something I truly treasure 💫

You're the kind of friend people wish for — the one who stays through thick and thin, who understands without words, and who makes even ordinary days feel special 💗 I may not say it every day, but I'm endlessly grateful for you and for the bond we share 🤍 No matter where life takes us, I know one thing for sure — our connection will never fade, it'll only grow stronger with time 🌍✨ Love you more than words can ever express, always and forever 🫶💖
Always yours 🌸
You're Simply Beautiful, Ruchiii 🌸
A film just for you
Happy Birthday Ruchi, my best friend 💖
